blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 23 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4 ft. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
